site.title: HeapForge - Where memory meets mastery.
site.description: A docs experience for web engineering, system thinking, UI/UX architecture, and product-minded technical writing.
site.ogDescription: Explore web systems, mobile product thinking, UI/UX architecture, and engineering notes shaped into a navigable knowledge base.

hero.title: Architecting the Next Generation of Real-time Reactive Interfaces

body.intro: The transition from static data fetching to granular reactivity marks a deeper shift in how we design digital interaction. As low-latency products become more common, the infrastructure behind them needs to evolve beyond traditional state patterns.
body.streamParagraph: By leaning on stream-based state primitives, teams can reduce the cost of virtual DOM reconciliation in dense, high-frequency interfaces such as terminal views or financial dashboards.
body.mobileParagraph: The mobile experience comes with a different set of constraints. Precision here is not only visual; it becomes essential for maintaining clarity on smaller viewports.

paradox.title: The Reactivity Paradox
paradox.description: Modern web architecture often forces teams to fight their framework just to achieve the precision required by high-density interfaces. The challenge is reducing re-render scope while keeping the model declarative.

mobile.title: Build Better Systems
mobile.description: Join 12,000+ engineers receiving bi-weekly deep dives into infrastructure, Rust, and distributed computing.

sidebar.title: Join the System
sidebar.description: Get engineering insights delivered to your terminal weekly.

author.title: About Alex Rivers
author.description: Engineering the intersection of high-performance application logic, information density, and product feel.
